title: Confusion swirls on source of diarrhea outbreak, but it’s still Taylor Farms
summary: When the FDA said their investigation converged on Taylor Farms, the agency means that, over and over again, tracebacks led them to shredded iceberg lettuce grown in Central Mexico and supplied by Taylor Farms—which also goes by Taylor Fresh Foods.
